mapper.select: SELECT total_point FROM clandb.bellatra_personal_score WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
SELECT id FROM clandb.bellatra_personal_score WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.bellatra_personal_score SET kills = #{kills}, score = #{score}, date = #{date} WHERE character_name = #{characterName} AND score < #{minScore}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clandb.bellatra_personal_score (account_name, character_name, kills, score, date) VALUES (#{accountName}, #{characterName}, #{kills}, #{score}, #{date})
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.bellatra_personal_score SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
